title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM)Intrinsic Value
description: A transparent, step-by-step discounted cash flow valuation of Howmet Aerospace. Using actual financials to arrive at a single fair value estimate for HWM shares.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Mathematically derived by analyzing historical FCF data. We use a 3-year CAGR logic bound between 5% and 15% to remain conservative.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
10Y Treasury: 4.18%. Assuming standard Equity Risk Premium of 5% and an Aerospace Beta of ~1.25. WACC derived mathematically.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
